parts.title: Part 1: Examiner Interview on Personal Travel Experiences
parts.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions about your personal travel experiences and daily life.
parts.content: Hello! Can you tell me a little about yourself? What do you like to do in your free time?

questions.question: Interview Questions
questions.tips: Be honest and speak clearly about your personal life and experiences.

part1Questions.question: What is your name?
part1Questions.tips: Say your name clearly and smile.

part1Questions.question: Where are you from?
part1Questions.tips: Mention your city or country of origin.

part1Questions.question: What do you like to do in your free time?
part1Questions.answer: I like to [hobby] in my free time.
part1Questions.tips: Talk about a simple hobby, like reading or watching movies.

part1Questions.question: Have you traveled to another country?
part1Questions.answer: Yes/No, I have/haven't traveled to another country.
part1Questions.tips: Answer with a simple yes or no, and be prepared to talk about your experience if you have traveled.

part1Questions.question: What is your favorite type of vacation?
part1Questions.answer: My favorite type of vacation is [type of vacation].
part1Questions.tips: Talk about a simple type of vacation, like a beach vacation or a city trip.

part1Questions.question: Do you prefer to travel alone or with friends?
part1Questions.tips: Answer with a simple preference and be prepared to talk about why you prefer it.

parts.title: Part 2: Collaborative Discussion on Travel Plans
parts.instructions: Discuss your travel plans with your partner and decide on a destination.
parts.content: You and your partner are planning a trip together. Discuss your options and decide on a destination.

questions.question: Where would you like to go on vacation?
imagePrompts: A picture of a beautiful beach with palm trees
A picture of a bustling city with tall skyscrapers
possibleAnswers: I would like to go to the beach.
I think we should visit a city.
How about we go to a national park?
